subject: Re: flight times
body:
ok

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

> Paris to Newark is running 7+32min,,,looks like a
> non stop flight. (wind -7 
> only).
> 
> Do you want crew to stay in NY this week?
> 
> My thoughts would be to airline home Tues. and have
> crew return late Thur 
> night.
> Boeing crew: Dave, Hammond and Morrison fly trip on
> Friday to Miami and STT 
> then drop plane in Jacksonville,
> Then Dave and I would meet in NY on Sunday to fly G2
> with GM to STT.
> Ghislaine and I would leave in helicopter Monday
> 25th to start our trip to 
> Tennessee. 3 days to complete weather permitting.  I
> would send Dave home when 
> he gets to STT.
> Does this work for you?
> pls advise
> LV
>

body_html:
ok

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

Paris to Newark is running 7+32min,,,looks like a
non stop flight. (wind -7
only).

Do you want crew to stay in NY this week?

My thoughts would be to airline home Tues. and have
crew return late Thur
night.
Boeing crew: Dave, Hammond and Morrison fly trip on
Friday to Miami and STT
then drop plane in Jacksonville,
Then Dave and I would meet in NY on Sunday to fly G2
with GM to STT.
Ghislaine and I would leave in helicopter Monday
25th to start our trip to
Tennessee. 3 days to complete weather permitting. I
would send Dave home when
he gets to STT.
Does this work for you?
pls advise
LV
